21.description: Catholic Charities provides emergency assistance, food pantry, immigration legal services, and disaster relief for low-income families in the Kanawha Valley including returning citizens seeking basic needs and case management referrals. Emergency assistance may include food, utility help, clothing, and case management with referrals to WV PATH, 211 West Virginia, and housing partners serving Kanawha County. Low-income returning citizens should bring photo ID and proof of address when available. This resource supports West Virginia residents navigating reentry in Kanawha, Putnam, Boone, and Clay counties.

La asistencia de emergencia puede incluir alimentos, ayuda con servicios, ropa y manejo de casos con referencias a WV PATH, 211 West Virginia y aliados de vivienda en Kanawha County. Este recurso apoya a residentes de Virginia Occidental en reinserción en los condados Kanawha, Putnam, Boone y Clay.

22.description: United Methodist ministry providing emergency shelter, transitional housing, food pantry, and case management for homeless and low-income individuals in the Northern Panhandle including men and women returning from incarceration. Staff conduct intake assessment and connect residents to structured shelter or transitional programming with referrals to WV PATH benefits, Legal Aid of West Virginia, and regional workforce partners in Ohio County. Returning citizens should call ahead to confirm bed availability, sobriety requirements, and referral policies. This resource supports West Virginia residents navigating reentry in Ohio, Marshall, Brooke, and Hancock counties.
22.description_es: Ministerio metodista unido con refugio de emergencia, vivienda transicional, despensa y manejo de casos para personas sin hogar y de bajos ingresos en el Panhandle Norte incluidos quienes regresan de la encarcelación. El personal realiza evaluaciones de admisión y conecta a residentes con refugio o vivienda transicional estructurada y referencias a WV PATH, Legal Aid of West Virginia y socios laborales en Ohio County. Llame con anticipación para confirmar disponibilidad y requisitos. Este recurso apoya a residentes de Virginia Occidental en reinserción en los condados Ohio, Marshall, Brooke y Hancock.

50.description: Kanawha County adult education program offering free GED and high school equivalency preparation, career certifications, and English language classes for adults including returning citizens seeking credentials for employment. Programs include high school equivalency (GED), adult basic education, and workforce readiness aligned with WorkForce West Virginia and Jobs & Hope referrals in Kanawha County. Returning citizens can rebuild credentials for fair-chance employment; call to confirm class schedules, testing fees, and enrollment documents before your first visit. This resource supports West Virginia residents navigating reentry in Kanawha County.

181.description: Continuum of Care coordinated entry system connecting people experiencing homelessness in the Kanawha Valley to shelter, rapid rehousing, and permanent supportive housing including returning citizens without stable housing. Staff conduct intake assessment and connect residents to structured shelter or transitional programming with referrals to WV PATH benefits, Legal Aid of West Virginia, and regional workforce partners in Kanawha County. Returning citizens should call ahead to confirm bed availability, sobriety requirements, and referral policies. This resource supports West Virginia residents navigating reentry in 6 West Virginia counties.
181.description_es: Sistema de admisión coordinada del Continuum of Care conecta a personas sin hogar en el valle Kanawha con refugio, realojamiento rápido y vivienda de apoyo permanente incluidos ciudadanos que regresan. El personal realiza evaluaciones de admisión y conecta a residentes con refugio o vivienda transicional estructurada y referencias a WV PATH, Legal Aid of West Virginia y socios laborales en Kanawha County. Llame con anticipación para confirmar disponibilidad y requisitos. Este recurso apoya a residentes de Virginia Occidental en reinserción en 6 condados de Virginia Occidental.

182.description: Faith-based social services providing emergency food pantry, utility assistance, clothing, and seasonal programs for low-income Kanawha County residents including returning citizens seeking basic needs support. Emergency assistance may include food, utility help, clothing, and case management with referrals to WV PATH, 211 West Virginia, and housing partners serving Kanawha County. Low-income returning citizens should bring photo ID and proof of address when available. This resource supports West Virginia residents navigating reentry in Kanawha County.
182.description_es: Servicios sociales basados en la fe con despensa de emergencia, asistencia de servicios, ropa y programas estacionales para residentes de bajos ingresos del condado Kanawha incluidos ciudadanos que regresan. La asistencia de emergencia puede incluir alimentos, ayuda con servicios, ropa y manejo de casos con referencias a WV PATH, 211 West Virginia y aliados de vivienda en Kanawha County. Este recurso apoya a residentes de Virginia Occidental en reinserción en condado de Kanawha.
182.services: Clothing assistance|Basic needs assistance|Rent and utility assistance|Partner referrals

229.description: Fayette County adult education providing GED preparation and workforce credentials for returning citizens in the New River Gorge region. Programs include high school equivalency (GED), adult basic education, and workforce readiness aligned with WorkForce West Virginia and Jobs & Hope referrals in Fayette County. Returning citizens can rebuild credentials for fair-chance employment; call to confirm class schedules, testing fees, and enrollment documents before your first visit. This resource supports West Virginia residents navigating reentry in Fayette, Raleigh, Summers, and Nicholas counties.
229.description_es: Educación para adultos de Fayette con preparación GED y credenciales laborales para ciudadanos que regresan en la región New River Gorge. Los programas incluyen equivalencia de secundaria (GED), educación básica para adultos y preparación laboral alineada con WorkForce West Virginia y Jobs & Hope en Fayette County. Ciudadanos que regresan pueden reconstruir credenciales; llame para confirmar horarios y documentos. Este recurso apoya a residentes de Virginia Occidental en reinserción en los condados Fayette, Raleigh, Summers y Nicholas.
229.services: GED and high school equivalency|Job readiness training|Employment assistance

230.services: GED and high school equivalency|Job readiness training|Employment assistance

240.description: Salvation Army Huntington provides emergency shelter referrals, utility assistance, food pantry, and seasonal programs for low-income Metro Valley residents including returning citizens without stable housing after release from Western Regional Jail. Staff conduct intake assessment and connect residents to structured shelter or transitional programming with referrals to WV PATH benefits, Legal Aid of West Virginia, and regional workforce partners in Cabell County. Returning citizens should call ahead to confirm bed availability, sobriety requirements, and referral policies. This resource supports West Virginia residents navigating reentry in Cabell, and Wayne counties.
240.description_es: Salvation Army Huntington ofrece referencias de refugio, asistencia de servicios, despensa y programas estacionales para residentes de bajos ingresos del valle metropolitano incluidos ciudadanos que regresan sin vivienda estable. El personal realiza evaluaciones de admisión y conecta a residentes con refugio o vivienda transicional estructurada y referencias a WV PATH, Legal Aid of West Virginia y socios laborales en Cabell County. Llame con anticipación para confirmar disponibilidad y requisitos. Este recurso apoya a residentes de Virginia Occidental en reinserción en los condados Cabell y Wayne.

242.description: Emergency shelter, meals, and case management for homeless individuals in Monongalia and Preston counties including returning citizens seeking housing near regional employers and West Virginia University. Staff conduct intake assessment and connect residents to structured shelter or transitional programming with referrals to WV PATH benefits, Legal Aid of West Virginia, and regional workforce partners in Monongalia County. Returning citizens should call ahead to confirm bed availability, sobriety requirements, and referral policies. This resource supports West Virginia residents navigating reentry in Monongalia, and Preston counties.
242.description_es: Refugio de emergencia, comidas y manejo de casos para personas sin hogar en Monongalia y Preston incluidos ciudadanos que regresan buscando vivienda. El personal realiza evaluaciones de admisión y conecta a residentes con refugio o vivienda transicional estructurada y referencias a WV PATH, Legal Aid of West Virginia y socios laborales en Monongalia County. Llame con anticipación para confirmar disponibilidad y requisitos. Este recurso apoya a residentes de Virginia Occidental en reinserción en los condados Monongalia y Preston.

244.description: Transitional housing and recovery support for men and women in southern West Virginia including returning citizens from Raleigh County seeking structured sober living in coalfield communities. Staff conduct intake assessment and connect residents to structured shelter or transitional programming with referrals to WV PATH benefits, Legal Aid of West Virginia, and regional workforce partners in Raleigh County. Returning citizens should call ahead to confirm bed availability, sobriety requirements, and referral policies. This resource supports West Virginia residents navigating reentry in Raleigh, Fayette, and Summers counties.
244.description_es: Vivienda transicional y apoyo en recuperación para hombres y mujeres en el sur de WV incluidos ciudadanos que regresan de Raleigh buscando vida sobria estructurada. El personal realiza evaluaciones de admisión y conecta a residentes con refugio o vivienda transicional estructurada y referencias a WV PATH, Legal Aid of West Virginia y socios laborales en Raleigh County. Llame con anticipación para confirmar disponibilidad y requisitos. Este recurso apoya a residentes de Virginia Occidental en reinserción en los condados Raleigh, Fayette y Summers.

245.description: Community Action Agency helping low-income southern coalfield residents including returning citizens access emergency rental assistance, utility help, and housing navigation in Mercer and surrounding counties. Staff conduct intake assessment and connect residents to structured shelter or transitional programming with referrals to WV PATH benefits, Legal Aid of West Virginia, and regional workforce partners in Mercer County. Returning citizens should call ahead to confirm bed availability, sobriety requirements, and referral policies. This resource supports West Virginia residents navigating reentry in 5 West Virginia counties.
245.description_es: Agencia de Acción Comunitaria ayudando a residentes de bajos ingresos de campos carboníferos del sur incluidos ciudadanos que regresan a acceder a asistencia de alquiler y navegación de vivienda. El personal realiza evaluaciones de admisión y conecta a residentes con refugio o vivienda transicional estructurada y referencias a WV PATH, Legal Aid of West Virginia y socios laborales en Mercer County. Llame con anticipación para confirmar disponibilidad y requisitos. Este recurso apoya a residentes de Virginia Occidental en reinserción en 5 condados de Virginia Occidental.

246.description: Public housing authority administering Section 8 housing choice vouchers and affordable housing for low-income families in Marion and Monongalia counties including eligible returning citizens meeting program requirements. Staff conduct intake assessment and connect residents to structured shelter or transitional programming with referrals to WV PATH benefits, Legal Aid of West Virginia, and regional workforce partners in Marion County. Returning citizens should call ahead to confirm bed availability, sobriety requirements, and referral policies. This resource supports West Virginia residents navigating reentry in Marion, Monongalia, Taylor, and Preston counties.
246.description_es: Autoridad de vivienda pública que administra vales Sección 8 y vivienda asequible para familias de bajos ingresos en Marion y Monongalia incluidos ciudadanos que regresan elegibles. El personal realiza evaluaciones de admisión y conecta a residentes con refugio o vivienda transicional estructurada y referencias a WV PATH, Legal Aid of West Virginia y socios laborales en Marion County. Llame con anticipación para confirmar disponibilidad y requisitos. Este recurso apoya a residentes de Virginia Occidental en reinserción en los condados Marion, Monongalia, Taylor y Preston.

247.description: Salvation Army Wheeling provides food pantry, utility assistance, clothing, and emergency aid for low-income Northern Panhandle residents including returning citizens seeking basic needs after release. Emergency assistance may include food, utility help, clothing, and case management with referrals to WV PATH, 211 West Virginia, and housing partners serving Ohio County. Low-income returning citizens should bring photo ID and proof of address when available. This resource supports West Virginia residents navigating reentry in Ohio, Marshall, Brooke, and Hancock counties.

La asistencia de emergencia puede incluir alimentos, ayuda con servicios, ropa y manejo de casos con referencias a WV PATH, 211 West Virginia y aliados de vivienda en Ohio County. Este recurso apoya a residentes de Virginia Occidental en reinserción en los condados Ohio, Marshall, Brooke y Hancock.

249.description: Community Action Agency serving southern coalfield counties with emergency utility assistance, weatherization, food support, and case management for low-income families including returning citizens. Emergency assistance may include food, utility help, clothing, and case management with referrals to WV PATH, 211 West Virginia, and housing partners serving Raleigh County. Low-income returning citizens should bring photo ID and proof of address when available. This resource supports West Virginia residents navigating reentry in 11 West Virginia counties.
